plan_under_test: The current legacy mark-scheme parser regenerates 13winter11_q10 without neighboring q6-q9 content.
tests_added_or_changed: Add a real-PDF sample-pipeline regression for W11 Paper 13 q10 mark-scheme boundaries.
expected_initial_failure: Not expected to fail in the current dirty worktree because the previous parser changes already appear to repair this case; the canonical output is stale.
what_passing_proves: Current code regenerates q10 without q9 answer text.
The generated q10 crop is much smaller than the stale 9174px canonical candidate.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not update the full canonical output set.
It does not prove every remaining suspicious crop is stale rather than a live parser bug.
risk_of_bad_tests: Moderate runtime cost because it processes a real PDF pair, but it is aligned with the historical-crop policy.
